bank.retain_mission: Extract decisions about LSPs, MCP servers, model QA, Salesforce architecture, and workflow architecture.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the meta-tooling stack (LSPs, MCP, Salesforce, workflow engines) and recurring integration patterns. Ignore one-off config tweaks.

mental_models.name: Tooling Stack
mental_models.source_query: What meta-tooling is in use (LSPs, MCP, Salesforce, workflow engines), and how do they fit together?

mental_models.name: Integration Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What integration and QA patterns hold across these tools? Include known pitfalls.
